title: Lenis instance mounted and ticking
verify: await page.evaluate(() => typeof window.__lenis !== 'undefined' || !!document.querySelector('[data-lenis-root]')); then scroll 400px and confirm window.scrollY moved > 100px within 600ms

title: No CSS scroll-behavior:smooth conflict with Lenis
verify: await page.evaluate(() => getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).scrollBehavior === 'smooth') → expect false

title: Lenis + GSAP ticker synced with lagSmoothing(0)
verify: Simulate visibilitychange event, then check no elements have opacity < 0.05 after 300ms

title: Scroll-reveal targets visible after entering viewport
verify: For each section: scrollIntoViewIfNeeded(), wait 900ms, then check all [data-reveal] / [class*='reveal'] have opacity > 0.9 and no clipPath stuck at inset(100%)

title: No element permanently stuck at opacity:0 after full-page scroll
verify: window.scrollTo(0, document.body.scrollHeight), wait 1200ms, find all elements with opacity < 0.1 and non-empty textContent — expect 0

title: Framer Motion whileInView uses viewport margin
verify: Source analysis: all whileInView uses include viewport={{ margin: '-10%' }} or equivalent

title: ScrollTrigger.refresh() called after fonts/images load
verify: Scroll to 50% of page height, check elements in viewport have opacity > 0.5

title: ScrollTriggers killed on route change
verify: Navigate to /about then back to /, confirm hero elements start their entrance animation and do not skip to final state

title: Exactly ONE signature wow interaction present
verify: Describe the signature interaction. Is there exactly one clearly distinct wow moment?

title: Signature interaction works on first load
verify: Marquee: confirm DOMMatrix transform.m41 changes over 300ms. CountUp: confirm textContent changes after scroll reveal. Cursor: confirm cursor div moves on mousemove.

title: Marquee loops seamlessly without gap or stutter
verify: Scroll fast while watching marquee — no flash of a gap at the loop seam. Total rendered items >= unique items * 2.

title: Custom cursor gated to fine-pointer devices only
verify: Emulate touch (maxTouchPoints=1): cursor element should be display:none and document.documentElement cursor !== 'none'

title: Every button has hover transform or box-shadow change
verify: Hover first 5 buttons, wait 200ms, check computed transform !== identity matrix OR boxShadow !== 'none'

title: Every button has press/active scale-down state
verify: Click and hold primary CTA — does it compress (scale 0.97–0.99)? Does it spring back on release?

title: Every interactive element has visible focus-visible ring
verify: Tab to each focusable element; computed outline !== 'none' or boxShadow !== 'none' when :focus-visible

title: Nav links have animated underline or hover state
verify: Check nav a::after has transition including transform or scaleX in computed styles

title: No transition:all on interactive elements
verify: Sample first 5 buttons/links — getComputedStyle(el).transition must not start with 'all'

title: Navigation changes visual state on scroll
verify: Record nav className+background+borderWidth at scrollY=0 and scrollY=300 — values must differ

title: Nav returns on scroll-up if hide-on-scroll pattern is used
verify: Scroll to 600px (nav hides), then scroll to 400px — nav should be visible again within 500ms

title: Active nav link highlights current section during scroll
verify: Scroll through sections and watch nav — active indicator should update in sync

title: canvas element present, visible, and non-zero size (if 3D specified)
verify: page.$('canvas') !== null, boundingBox width > 0 and height > 0, display !== 'none', opacity > 0.05

title: Canvas renders non-blank pixels (not solid black or transparent)
verify: gl.readPixels at center and two off-center samples — at least one sample has alpha > 0 and (r > 10 OR g > 10 OR b > 10)

title: 3D bundle code-split with dynamic + ssr:false
verify: Page HTML (SSR output) does not contain 'THREE', 'WebGLRenderer', or 'BufferGeometry' — canvas only appears after JS runs

title: 3D scene not gated off by over-eager mobile or reduced-motion check
verify: Emulate iPhone 14 (390px) and reduced-motion: canvas still present in DOM (may be paused/static but not null)

title: WebGL context creation failure does not throw uncaught error
verify: Collect page errors during load — filter for WebGL/THREE/gl_ errors — expect 0. Fallback image shown if WebGL unavailable.

title: No layout properties (width/height/top/left/margin) in scroll or hover transitions
verify: Grep compiled CSS for 'transition: width', 'transition: height', 'transition: top', 'transition: left', 'transition: margin' — expect 0 matches

title: will-change:transform on GPU-animated scroll layers
verify: Parallax layer elements have getComputedStyle().willChange === 'transform'

title: will-change not applied globally to more than ~20 elements
verify: Count elements with willChange !== 'auto' — flag if > 50

title: No transition:all on any element in the page
verify: Sample first 300 elements — getComputedStyle(el).transition.startsWith('all') must be false for all

title: With reduced-motion emulated, no critical content stuck at opacity:0
verify: emulateMedia({ reducedMotion: 'reduce' }), scroll to bottom, find elements with opacity < 0.1 and textContent.length > 5 — expect 0

title: Preloader exits in under 800ms with reduced-motion
verify: emulateMedia({ reducedMotion: 'reduce' }), waitForFunction preloader opacity < 0.05 with timeout 800ms

title: GSAP animations wrapped in gsap.matchMedia() reduced-motion guard
verify: Source analysis: gsap.from/gsap.to calls inside matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)') context or prefersReduced check

title: Marquee stops moving with reduced-motion active
verify: emulateMedia({ reducedMotion: 'reduce' }), sample DOMMatrix.m41 at t=0 and t=400ms — delta must be < 1px

title: Preloader visible and animating on first visit
verify: Clear sessionStorage, navigate, immediately check [data-preloader] opacity > 0.5

title: Preloader skipped on repeat visit via sessionStorage
verify: sessionStorage.setItem('helm_intro_seen','1'), navigate, hero visible within 500ms

title: Hero entrance completes — words not stuck off-screen
verify: Wait for preloader to clear (opacity < 0.1), then check all [data-reveal='word'] have DOMMatrix.m42 < 5px and opacity > 0.9

title: Preloader total duration ≤ 1800ms (non-reduced-motion)
verify: Clear sessionStorage, navigate, waitForFunction preloader opacity < 0.1 with 2500ms budget — elapsed must be < 1800ms

title: Page transition overlay animates in and out on route change
verify: Click internal nav link, check at 100ms overlay is visible (scaleX > 0.1), check at 1000ms overlay is gone (opacity < 0.1 or display:none)

title: ScrollTriggers killed on route change (no duplicate stacking)
verify: Navigate away and back, confirm hero words animate in from start position (not already at final state, and not duplicated)

title: One pinned/scrub scroll-storytelling section exists
verify: Find element with position:sticky or GSAP pin attribute — expect count > 0. VISUAL: slow-scroll through it and confirm 2+ beats reveal.

title: Pinned section uses anticipatePin:1 and invalidateOnRefresh:true
verify: Source analysis: scrollTrigger config objects include both anticipatePin:1 and invalidateOnRefresh:true

title: No console errors from GSAP, Framer Motion, Lenis, or Three.js
verify: Collect all page errors during load + full-page scroll. Filter for /gsap|ScrollTrigger|lenis|framer|motion|three|fiber|WebGL/i — expect 0

title: GSAP plugins registered once at module level
verify: Source analysis: gsap.registerPlugin() calls are outside React component functions

title: No linear easing on spatial (transform) animations
verify: Grep compiled JS for ease:"linear" on gsap.from/to calls or Framer Motion variants that animate x/y/transform — expect 0

title: Exit animations 15–25% shorter than entrance animations
verify: Open and close a modal or trigger page transition. Does exit feel snappy vs entrance? Entrance 600ms → exit ≤ 480ms.

title: Entrance animations use same easing family across sections
verify: Scroll full page. Does motion feel cohesive — same curve family throughout — or do sections each have their own arbitrary easing?

title: Motion timing tokens imported from single source (lib/motion-tokens)
verify: Source analysis: no inline duration: 0.3 or ease: [0.16, 1, ...] values outside motion-tokens.ts

title: Marquees aria-hidden; count-up tickers have aria-label with final value
verify: All [class*='marquee'] have aria-hidden='true'. All count-up spans have aria-label set to the final number + suffix.

title: No broken or next/image elements
verify: Array.from(document.images).filter(i => !i.complete || i.naturalWidth === 0) — expect empty array

title: No 404 / network errors for any resource
verify: page.on('response') collect status >= 400 — expect empty array after networkidle

title: No broken CSS background-images
verify: Extract all background-image URLs from computed styles, fetch each, expect status < 400; visual check for blank background areas

title: Fonts actually load — no FOIT / fallback-only text
verify: await document.fonts.ready; Array.from(document.fonts).every(f => f.status === 'loaded') — expect true

title: next/font used — no raw @font-face without font-display
verify: Iterate cssRules for CSSFontFaceRule; expect every rule has explicit font-display: swap/optional/block

title: <video> elements load and have poster attribute
verify: document.querySelectorAll('video') — each must have .poster non-empty and .error === null

title: 3D assets (.glb/.gltf/.hdr) load — no 404 or CORS errors
verify: Network failures filtered for /\.(glb|gltf|hdr|bin)$/i must be empty; console errors matching /cors|cross.?origin/ must be empty

title: Favicon and apple-touch-icon load
verify: GET /favicon.ico + all <link rel='icon'> hrefs + all <link rel='apple-touch-icon'> hrefs — expect status < 400

title: Images have explicit width/height or sizes (no CLS)
verify: document.images — each must have width+height attributes, or sizes attribute, or CSS aspect-ratio set

title: SVGs render visibly with non-zero dimensions
verify: document.querySelectorAll('svg') — each getBoundingClientRect() must have width > 0 and height > 0

title: No placeholder or unverified external image URLs
verify: All image srcs and background-image values must not match picsum.photos|via.placeholder.com|loremflickr.com|placeimg.com|images.unsplash.com/photo-<random>

title: All images have a non-empty alt attribute
verify: document.images — every img must have hasAttribute('alt') === true (empty string allowed for decorative)

title: No console errors from media or asset loading
verify: page.on('console') collect type==='error'; filter for /failed to load|net::err|decode error|not found|404|webgl|texture/i — expect empty

title: JSON data files load and are valid
verify: All .json responses must return status 200 and parse without throwing — res.json() must not throw

title: Open Graph and Twitter meta images resolve
verify: GET meta[property='og:image'] content + meta[name='twitter:image'] content — expect status < 400

title: Large images served as WebP or AVIF (next/image optimization active)
verify: All image responses > 10 KB must have content-type containing 'webp' or 'avif'

title: No mixed-content (HTTP assets on HTTPS page)
verify: page.on('request') — if page URL is https://, no request URL may start with http:// — expect empty array

title: Asset CDN/origin TTFB < 600 ms for image/font/video
verify: res.timing().responseStart - res.timing().requestStart < 600 for all image/font/video responses

title: npm run build exits with code 0
verify: npm run build; echo "EXIT:$?" — assert printed exit code is EXIT:0

title: tsc --noEmit clean (no TypeScript errors)
verify: npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tee /tmp/tsc.out; [ ! -s /tmp/tsc.out ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL — output file must be 0 bytes

title: ESLint 0 errors
verify: npx next lint --max-warnings 0; echo "EXIT:$?" — expect EXIT:0

title: ESLint 0 warnings
verify: npx next lint 2>&1 | grep -c 'Warning' — expect 0

title: No console.log in production source
verify: grep -rn 'console\.log' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' src/ app/ components/ lib/ | grep -v '\.test\.' | grep -v '\.spec\.' | wc -l — expect 0

title: No console.warn/error/debug in production source
verify: grep -rn 'console\.\(warn\|error\|debug\|info\)' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' src/ app/ components/ lib/ | grep -v '\.test\.' | grep -v '\.spec\.' | wc -l — expect 0

title: No TODO/FIXME/placeholder strings shipped
verify: grep -rni 'TODO\|FIXME\|not implemented\|placeholder\|lorem ipsum\|coming soon\|under construction' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.mdx' src/ app/ components/ | grep -v '\.test\.' | wc -l — expect 0

title: .next/ output directory exists post-build
verify: [ -d .next/static ] && [ -d .next/server ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL — both subdirs must exist

title: No secrets or API keys in client bundle
verify: grep -r 'sk-\|sk_live\|secret_key\|api_secret' .next/static/chunks/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l — expect 0; also grep NEXT_PUBLIC_ .next/static/chunks/ for unintended secret vars

title: Env vars match documented requirements in .env.example
verify: diff <(grep 'NEXT_PUBLIC_' .env.example | cut -d= -f1 | sort) <(grep -rho 'process\.env\.[A-Z_]*' src/ app/ lib/ | grep 'NEXT_PUBLIC_' | cut -d. -f3 | sort -u) — expect empty diff

title: next.config.* has no syntax errors
verify: node -e "require('./next.config.js')" 2>&1 | wc -l — expect 0 lines; also covered by BC-001 build exit code

title: Dev server starts without errors
verify: timeout 30 npx next dev 2>&1 | head -40 | grep -iE 'error|failed|cannot find' | wc -l — expect 0; server must print 'Ready' within 30s

title: Dev server localhost:3000 returns HTTP 200
verify: curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000 — expect 200

title: next start (production) serves HTTP 200 on /
verify: npm run build && npx next start & sleep 3 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000 — expect 200

title: All app routes return HTTP 200 (no 404s)
verify: Enumerate routes: find app -name 'page.tsx' | sed 's|app||; s|/page\.tsx||; s|^$|/|'. For each route, curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000$ROUTE — expect all 200

title: favicon.ico present and returns HTTP 200
verify: curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000/favicon.ico — expect 200; also [ -f public/favicon.ico ] || [ -f app/favicon.ico ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

title: Zero browser console errors at runtime
verify: Playwright: const errors=[]; page.on('console', msg => { if (msg.type()==='error') errors.push(msg.text()); }); await page.goto(url); expect(errors).toHaveLength(0) — run per route

title: Zero browser console warnings at runtime
verify: Playwright: same as BC-017 but filter msg.type()==='warning' — expect 0 per route

title: No React hydration mismatch warning
verify: Playwright console listener — scan msg.text() for /hydrat|did not match|server.*client/i — any match is FAIL; also page.on('pageerror') for same pattern

title: No uncaught runtime exceptions
verify: Playwright: const uncaught=[]; page.on('pageerror', err => uncaught.push(err.message)); await page.goto(url); expect(uncaught).toHaveLength(0) — run per route

title: No unhandled promise rejections
verify: Playwright: page.on('pageerror') filter for 'UnhandledPromiseRejection' or 'Promise rejection'; page.on('console') filter for same — expect 0 per route

title: No missing React key prop warnings
verify: Playwright console listener: scan for 'Each child in a list should have a unique key' or 'Warning: Each child' — any match is FAIL across all list-rendering routes

title: All primary nav links resolve (no dead hrefs)
verify: Playwright: page.$$eval('nav a[href], header a[href]', els => els.map(el=>el.getAttribute('href')).filter(h=>h&&h.startsWith('/'))) — for each href, request.get(url) expect status < 400

title: No href='#' stub links on primary CTAs or nav
verify: grep -rn 'href="#"' src/ app/ components/ | wc -l — expect 0; also Playwright page.$$eval('nav a, header a', els => els.filter(el=>el.getAttribute('href')==='#').length) — expect 0

title: All internal body links resolve (no 404/500)
verify: Playwright per route: collect all a[href] starting with /, deduplicate, HEAD each: request.head('http://localhost:3000'+href) expect status < 400

title: External links use rel='noopener noreferrer'
verify: grep -rn 'target="_blank"' src/ app/ components/ | grep -v 'noopener' | wc -l — expect 0

title: No visible placeholder or lorem ipsum text on any page
verify: Load each route in browser; scan page body for 'Lorem ipsum', 'Placeholder', 'Coming soon', 'TODO', '[Name]', '[Description]', 'Sample text' — any visible match is FAIL

title: Favicon renders correctly in browser tab
verify: Open http://localhost:3000 in browser — confirm correct favicon appears in tab, not default Next.js globe or broken icon

title: No broken images on any page
verify: Playwright per route: page.$$eval('img', imgs => imgs.filter(img => !img.complete || img.naturalWidth === 0).map(img => img.src)) — expect empty array

title: No layout overflow or horizontal scrollbar at 1440px
verify: Playwright viewport {width:1440,height:900}: page.evaluate(() => document.body.scrollWidth > window.innerWidth) — expect false; confirm visually no scrollbar appears

title: No layout overflow at 375px mobile viewport
verify: Playwright viewport {width:375,height:812}: page.evaluate(() => document.body.scrollWidth > window.innerWidth) — expect false; confirm visually

title: No failed network requests (4xx/5xx) during page load
verify: Playwright: const failures=[]; page.on('response', res => { if(res.status()>=400) failures.push({url:res.url(),status:res.status()}); }); await page.goto(url); expect(failures).toHaveLength(0) — run per route

title: No mixed content (HTTP assets on HTTPS pages)
verify: Playwright console listener for 'Mixed Content' messages — expect 0; grep -rn 'http://' src/ app/ | grep -v 'localhost\|127\.0\.0\.1\|example\.com\|//' for static review

title: Each page has a non-empty <title>
verify: Playwright per route: await page.title() — expect non-empty string, not 'Untitled' or default fallback

title: Each page has a <meta name='description'> tag
verify: Playwright per route: page.$eval('meta[name="description"]', el => el.getAttribute('content')) — expect non-empty string; missing element throws = FAIL

title: Form has success/error feedback
verify: VISUAL: Trigger form submission; confirm feedback state appears

title: All brief sections exist
verify: VISUAL: Cross-reference brief line-by-line against live page

title: Requested integrations mentioned
verify: VISUAL: Search page for each integration named in brief

title: Screenshots are real product UI
verify: VISUAL: Inspect all product screenshots for real UI content

title: Demo/video embed present (if requested)
verify: VISUAL: Confirm video element or embed is present and plays

title: Not the default AI palette
verify: Does the site use the navy/indigo→purple gradient + soft white glow combination as its primary brand expression? PASS if it does NOT.

title: Display face is not Inter/Arial/system default
verify: computed font-family of h1 must not match: Inter, Arial, Helvetica, system-ui, -apple-system, Roboto, Geist (as sole display face).

title: Exactly one accent hue, used in ≥4 rules
verify: Count distinct hue values (±15° tolerance) in interactive CSS. Must equal 1. Accent CSS var must appear in ≥ 4 CSS rule locations.

title: Identity is deliberate, not defaulted
verify: Does the palette + typeface pairing reflect a deliberate identity decision? Could you swap the brand name for a competitor and nothing would change? PASS if it is product-specific.

title: Display typeface has visual personality
verify: AUTO: h1 font-family not in ban list. VISUAL: heading face has distinctive character — not a perfectly neutral grotesque at default weight. PASS if both pass.

title: 4× type scale contrast minimum per section
verify: In any section, largest-to-smallest font-size ratio must be ≥ 4:1. PASS if TRUE.

title: Display text has negative letter-spacing
verify: Elements with font-size >= 40px: letter-spacing <= -0.01em. Elements with font-size >= 64px: letter-spacing <= -0.025em.

title: Body text contrast ≥ 4.5:1
verify: Contrast ratio of primary body text color vs immediate background must be >= 4.5:1 (WCAG AA).

title: No decorative text below 11px
verify: All visible text nodes must have computed font-size >= 11px. Exception: disabled/placeholder states.

title: Hero is not centered-headline-on-gradient cliché
verify: Hero layout must NOT be: centered headline + centered subline + centered CTA pair on a gradient background with glow blob. PASS if layout is offset, editorial, full-bleed image, or typographically dominant.

title: No even 3-column emoji/icon feature grid
verify: No section may use 3 equal-width columns each with a centered emoji/icon, short title, and 1–2 lines of copy. PASS if this pattern is absent from every section.

title: No two adjacent sections share the same layout shape
verify: Inspect every consecutive section pair. PASS if no two neighbors share the same structural pattern (column count, alignment, and density must differ).

title: Asymmetric layout present (5/7, 7/5, 60/40, or off-axis)
verify: At least one section must use an off-axis layout or a column that bleeds past the container. PASS if TRUE.

title: At least one full-bleed element
verify: VISUAL: at least one element stretches to viewport edge. AUTO hint: find element with width:100vw or negative margin equal to gutter.

title: Background weight alternates across sections
verify: No three consecutive sections may share the same luminance band (all-light or all-dark). PASS if light↔dark rhythm exists.

title: Section vertical rhythm is varied
verify: padding-top values across all <section> elements must include at least 3 distinct values. FAIL if all sections share identical padding.

title: Every button has custom :hover style
verify: For every <button> and <a class~=btn>: a :hover rule must set background, transform, box-shadow, or color change beyond browser default cursor:pointer. 100% coverage required.

title: Every button has :focus-visible ring
verify: For every <button> and <a class~=btn>: a :focus-visible rule must set outline or box-shadow ring. outline:none without replacement = FAIL.

title: Primary CTA has press/active state
verify: Primary CTA must have :active CSS rule with transform:scale(<1) or translateY(+n), OR a Framer Motion whileTap / GSAP press handler in source.

title: Nav links have custom hover treatment beyond color
verify: <nav> anchor :hover rules must go beyond color change: underline draw, pseudo-element indicator, opacity shift, or translateX. Browser underline default = FAIL.

title: Button design is custom — not browser/shadcn default
verify: Primary CTA must have a border-radius, padding, weight, and color that reflect the site's identity tokens. Generic gray-border or unstyled = FAIL.

title: Grain overlay is present
verify: body::after or a fixed overlay must have: SVG feTurbulence or noise texture background-image, opacity 0.03–0.12, pointer-events:none, position:fixed, z-index > 100.

title: At least 5 craft micro-details present
verify: PASS if ≥ 5 of: mono eyebrows, section counters, animated underlines on links, 1px inset highlight border, em-dash list markers, custom dividers, card hover-reveal, consistent caption scale (11–12px tracked-out).

title: Radius is from a token system (≤4 distinct values)
verify: border-radius values on buttons, cards, inputs, badges must derive from ≤ 4 distinct token values. More than 5 distinct values = no token system = FAIL.

title: No uniform default box-shadow on all cards
verify: If > 60% of card elements share the exact value '0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' or Tailwind shadow-md default, FAIL. Expected: flat, directional, or inset-highlight + directional.

title: No pure #000000 or #ffffff backgrounds
verify: computed background-color of <html>, <body>, and first full-bleed section must not equal rgb(0,0,0) or rgb(255,255,255) exactly.

title: No aurora blob / stacked blur circles in hero
verify: VISUAL: hero must not use multiple overlapping blur(80px+) divs producing mesh-gradient effect. AUTO: elements with filter:blur(>=60px) — more than 3 decorative blur elements = FAIL.

title: Hero headline is a visual object, not a label
verify:
Hero headline must be >= 56px, use a non-default font, intentional leading, and command the page like an image. A

with bigger font floating on a gradient = FAIL.

title: No generic hero badge with emoji and gradient border
verify: No gradient-border pill badge with emoji above hero headline. PASS if absent or replaced with a plain editorial flag.

title: Hero visual is not a perspective-tilted screenshot
verify: VISUAL: hero does not use perspective() rotateX(5deg) product screenshot on gradient. AUTO: no inline style or CSS rule with perspective + rotateX/rotateY on images in hero section.

title: Exactly ONE signature wow interaction
verify: Exactly one memorable interaction describable in a sentence (marquee, custom cursor, hover reveal, count-up tickers, clip-reveal links, or pinned scroll reveal). Zero = static/dead. Two+ = diluted. PASS if exactly one.

title: Scroll-driven storytelling moment present
verify: At least one section must use scroll position to drive a narrative (pinned beats, sticky product panel, compositional parallax). Simple intersection fade-once does NOT count.

title: Preloader fires first visit, skips repeat
verify: On first visit (no sessionStorage intro key): loading screen appears before hero. After preloader: sessionStorage key set. On second visit: preloader skipped, hero visible immediately.

title: No broken or placeholder images
verify: All elements: naturalWidth > 0. src must not contain: placeholder, lorem, picsum, via.placeholder.com, dummyimage.com.

title: No stock photo with watermark or generic business imagery
verify: All images are product screenshots, custom illustration, abstract graphic treatment, or intentional photography. Generic stock business imagery = FAIL.

title: No lorem ipsum or 'coming soon' copy
verify: document.body.innerText must not contain: 'lorem ipsum', 'coming soon', 'placeholder', 'TODO', 'your text here', or any 5+ repeated-word sequence.

title: Site could only be for THIS product
verify: Could you swap the logo and product name for a competitor and nothing need redesigning? PASS if swapping would require layout/visual redesign — identity is product-specific.

title: Generous intentional whitespace (≥35% void per viewport)
verify: In any viewport screenshot, at least 35% is negative space (background with no content). Packed/cramped = FAIL.

title: Asymmetry is the default — centered sections < 40%
verify: Count all content sections. Fewer than 40% may use centered/symmetric composition. PASS if asymmetry dominates.

title: No plain horizontal logo strip under hero
verify: Social proof section is NOT a plain row of grayscale logos with 'Trusted by teams at...' directly below the hero. PASS if absent or replaced with designed alternative.

title: Nav is not all-glass sticky bar from scroll position 0
verify: VISUAL: nav must not be a full-width backdrop-blur bar visible from the very top. AUTO: check backdrop-filter:blur on <header>/<nav> at scroll=0. If present at rest (not only after scroll), flag.

title: Footer is not a dense link grid
verify: Footer has personality: minimal one-line copyright, display-type editorial footer, or interactive element. Standard 4-column enterprise link grid = FAIL.

title: Holistic: looks hand-crafted, not generated
verify: 10-second screenshot test: 'Was this built by a specific designer with a point of view, or generated for a generic SaaS brief?' PASS only if the answer is clearly the former. Any doubt = identify failing items and fix.

title: First Load JS ≤ 300 KB (gzipped)
verify: Run `next build` and parse stdout route table for `/` First Load JS column, or sum .next/build-manifest.json chunk sizes and gzip-measure them. PASS if ≤ 300 KB.

title: GSAP / Three.js / R3F not in initial chunk
verify: grep source for static top-level `import ... from 'gsap'|'three'|'@react-three/*'` in non-dynamic page/layout files. Also `strings .next/static/chunks/framework-*.js | grep -i 'three\|gsap'` — expect no matches.

title: 3D/animation components use dynamic() with ssr:false
verify: grep -rn 'dynamic(' src/ app/ pages/ --include='*.tsx' | grep -v 'ssr: false' — any dynamic() import of a heavy component without ssr:false = FAIL.

title: All images use next/image or have explicit width/height + modern format
verify: grep -rn '

title: No single asset > 500 KB
verify: find public/ -type f \( -name '*.jpg' -o -name '*.png' -o -name '*.gif' -o -name '*.webp' -o -name '*.mp4' \) -size +500k -ls — any result = FAIL.

title: Fonts loaded via next/font, no render-blocking font CSS
verify: grep -rn 'fonts.googleapis.com' src/ app/ pages/ --include='*.tsx' — any hit = FAIL. Confirm font imports come from 'next/font/*' only.

title: LCP hero image has next/image priority prop
verify: grep -rn 'priority' components/ app/ pages/ --include='*.tsx' | grep -i 'hero\|landing' — missing priority on above-fold next/image = FAIL. Hero image should be < 200 KB.

title: CLS < 0.1
verify: Playwright PerformanceObserver layout-shift: accumulate entry.value where !hadRecentInput over 5 s after navigation. expect(cls).toBeLessThan(0.1). Also visually audit font swap, unsized images, animated reveals.

title: Animations use transform/opacity only — no layout thrash
verify: grep -rn 'transition:.*width\|height\|top\|left\|margin' src/ app/ --include='*.css' and grep gsap.to calls for width/height/top/left tweens — any hit = FAIL. Chrome Rendering > Paint flashing should show no green flashes during animation.

title: GSAP / ScrollTrigger / addEventListener cleaned up in useEffect
verify: Files with addEventListener must also contain removeEventListener. Files with gsap animations must use gsap.context().revert() or explicit .kill() in useEffect cleanup. Grep for violations.

title: Scroll handlers use RAF / no synchronous layout reads
verify: grep raw scroll handlers (not ScrollTrigger) and check for getBoundingClientRect/offsetTop calls inside without RAF wrapping — any synchronous layout read in a scroll callback = FAIL.

title: Offscreen/below-fold heavy content lazy-loaded
verify: grep for IntersectionObserver/useInView/whileInView gating heavy below-fold components. Network tab on Slow 4G — heavy sections must not initiate requests until viewport entry.

title: Lighthouse performance score ≥ 90
verify: npx lighthouse <prod-url> --only-categories=performance --output=json | parse .categories.performance.score * 100 >= 90. Sub-metrics: LCP<2.5s, INP<200ms, CLS<0.1, TBT<200ms, FCP<1.8s.

title: GSAP tree-shaken — only registered plugins imported
verify: grep 'gsap.registerPlugin' — each plugin registered must have a specific named import. Blanket `import gsap from 'gsap'` in non-dynamic files = HIGH warning.

title: preload/preconnect hints for critical third-party origins
verify: grep -rn 'preload\|preconnect' src/ app/ pages/ — if external origins used with no preconnect hints = MEDIUM warning. next/image priority handles preload automatically for hero images.

title: next.config image domains/remotePatterns no wildcard
verify: grep -A 20 'images:' next.config.* | grep -E 'hostname.*\*\*|domains.*\*' — wildcard hostname = FAIL.

title: No document.write or synchronous XHR
verify: grep -rn 'document.write\|XMLHttpRequest.*open.*false' src/ app/ pages/ --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' — any hit = FAIL.

title: Background videos are muted with preload=none
verify: grep -rn '<video' src/ app/ pages/ --include='*.tsx' — any <video> without `muted` = FAIL. Below-fold video without preload='none' = MEDIUM warning.

title: No horizontal page scroll
verify: auto

title: No element overflowing viewport edge
verify: auto

title: No element wider than viewport without clipping parent
verify: auto

title: No unintentional content overlap
verify: visual

title: Text not clipped by fixed-height containers
verify: auto

title: Navigation usable at all breakpoints
verify: auto

title: Mobile menu opens and closes correctly
verify: auto

title: Images scale within viewport, no overflow
verify: auto

title: Tap targets >= 44x44px on mobile
verify: auto

title: No unreadably small text on mobile
verify: auto

title: Sections stack correctly on mobile
verify: visual

title: Sticky/fixed elements do not obscure content
verify: auto

title: No empty large gaps between sections
verify: visual

title: Layout holds at 320px minimum width
verify: auto

title: Correct viewport meta tag present, no zoom lock
verify: auto

title: Page not visually zoomed or scaled abnormally
verify: auto

title: Text visible and not invisible after responsive CSS
verify: visual

title: Interactive elements reachable by keyboard
verify: auto

title: Form fields usable and not clipped on mobile
verify: auto

title: Hero/banner section scales correctly on mobile
verify: visual

title: Dropdowns and tooltips appear above content
verify: visual

title: Animations do not cause layout shift (CLS <= 0.1)
verify: auto

title: Print media query does not destroy screen layout
verify: visual

title: 1920px ultra-wide: content constrained, not stretched
verify: visual

title: Page title is non-default and meaningful
verify: document.title is non-empty, != 'Create Next App', length between 10 and 60

title: Meta description present with valid length
verify: document.querySelector('meta[name="description"]').content.length between 50 and 160

title: og:title present and non-empty
verify: document.querySelector('meta[property="og:title"]') !== null and content.trim().length > 0

title: og:description present with valid length
verify: document.querySelector('meta[property="og:description"]').content.length between 50 and 200

title: og:image present and URL returns HTTP 200
verify: meta[property='og:image'] exists and non-empty; curl og:image URL returns 200 with image MIME type

title: og:type set to a valid Open Graph type
verify: document.querySelector('meta[property="og:type"]').content in ['website','article','product']

title: og:url is an absolute HTTPS URL
verify: document.querySelector('meta[property="og:url"]').content matches /^https:\/\/.+/

title: All four twitter: card meta tags present
verify: meta[name='twitter:card'], meta[name='twitter:title'], meta[name='twitter:description'], meta[name='twitter:image'] all present and non-empty

title: twitter:image URL returns HTTP 200
verify: curl meta[name='twitter:image'] content URL returns 200 with image MIME type

title: Canonical URL present, absolute HTTPS, no localhost
verify: document.querySelector('link[rel="canonical"]').href matches /^https:\/\// and does not include 'localhost'

title: Meta viewport has width=device-width and initial-scale=1
verify: document.querySelector('meta[name="viewport"]').content includes 'width=device-width' and 'initial-scale=1'

title: html lang attribute is a valid BCP 47 tag
verify: document.documentElement.lang matches /^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$/ and length >= 2

title: Favicon link tag present and /favicon.ico returns 200
verify: link[rel='icon'] or link[rel='shortcut icon'] present; fetch /favicon.ico returns 200

title: apple-touch-icon link present and href returns 200
verify: document.querySelector('link[rel="apple-touch-icon"]') !== null; curl href returns 200

title: Exactly one H1 with meaningful content
verify: document.querySelectorAll('h1').length === 1 and textContent.trim().length >= 5 and not a placeholder string

title: Semantic heading hierarchy with no skipped levels
verify: Extract heading level sequence from DOM; confirm no level skips > 1 step (e.g., h1 directly to h3)

title: /robots.txt returns 200 and contains User-agent directive
verify: fetch /robots.txt returns 200; response body contains 'User-agent:'; Sitemap: directive present; production does not have Disallow: / for *

title: /sitemap.xml returns 200 with valid XML and at least one <url>
verify: fetch /sitemap.xml returns 200; XML parses successfully; contains >= 1 <url><loc> entry

title: At least one valid JSON-LD structured data block present
verify: document.querySelectorAll('script[type="application/ld+json"]').length >= 1; each block parses as valid JSON with @context and @type

title: No accidental noindex in meta robots or X-Robots-Tag header
verify: meta[name='robots'].content does not include 'noindex'; curl -I response X-Robots-Tag header does not include 'noindex'

title: All elements have an alt attribute
verify: document.querySelectorAll('img:not([alt])').length === 0

title: Image alt text is descriptive (not generic)
verify: No img alt equals 'image', 'photo', 'picture', 'img', 'graphic', 'icon', 'logo', 'banner', 'hero', 'untitled', or a bare filename

title: Links use descriptive anchor text (no bare 'click here')
verify: No <a> with textContent in ['click here','here','read more','more','learn more','this','link'] without an aria-label override

title: Next.js generateMetadata used; no scaffold boilerplate in metadata
verify: grep -r 'generateMetadata|export const metadata' app/ returns >= 1 result; grep for 'Create Next App' returns 0 results

title: OG image is ≥ 600×315 px, aspect ratio ~1.91:1, and ≤ 5 MB
verify: Download og:image; confirm width >= 600, height >= 315, file size <= 5242880 bytes, aspect ratio ~1.91:1

title: OG image contains brand identity and readable text
verify: Open og:image URL directly; confirm brand name/logo visible, title text legible at thumbnail scale; validate via Twitter Card Validator or opengraph.xyz
